scope_boundary: One authored balanced 32-task held-out corpus and one local quantized Qwen3-8B snapshot; the full policy improved routing and useful outcomes but was not a safety Pareto improvement and the verifier repaired no initially incorrect deliberation cases.
transition_reason: Route correctness rose from 6 to 31 and useful outcomes from 9 to 21 relative to LLM-first, while the full policy produced two unsafe outputs versus zero for LLM-first and the contract verifier produced no useful repair. The mixed local effect narrows the claim and blocks promotion.
negative_results: the full policy produced two unsafe outputs versus zero for LLM-first
fixed deliberation corrupted three initially correct answers and repaired two
adaptive stopping corrupted one initially correct answer and repaired one
verifier-gated stopping preserved twelve initially correct answers but repaired none
fifteen historical correct-to-incorrect cases remain regression records without reconstructed prompts or new calls
downgrade_triggers: mixed deliberation effects are described as useful scaling
internal implementation separation is described as external independence
local authored results are generalized to deployment or transfer
promotion_burden: Run prospectively frozen ambiguous natural workloads with multiple stronger models, genuinely independent evaluation, exact fallback and abstention accounting, useful verifier repairs, all fifteen known harm regressions, costs, reproduction, and transfer.
reviewer_independence: local maintainer-agent review only; no external human review requested or claimed
acceptance_blockers: unsafe-output rate was worse than LLM-first
verifier repaired no initially incorrect deliberation case
transfer and independent evaluation were not established
non_claims: does not establish a safe or generally useful reflexive router
does not establish useful test-time scaling
does not establish evaluator independence outside internal implementation separation
does not establish transfer, deployment, SOTA, AGI, or ASI
does not promote any chapter core claim above argument
does not add a pre-deliberative chapter
